  The mission now waits on exactly one thing: your read-list ratification on the board. Everything else either runs without you (cmux-advisor's handoffs, the open tasks) or queues behind that gate.
  Goodnight, or fire the gate whenever you surface.

✻ Worked for 2m 8s · 3 shells still running
                                                                                                                                                                    new task? /clear to save 446.4k tokens
